qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Which of the following is the strongest correct statement about a finite language over some finite alphabet A. It could be undecidable B. It is Turing-machine recognizable C. It is a context-sensitive language. D. It is a regular language. E. None of the above,
